title: Transitive Robotics 宣布 Transitive 2.0 开源机器人框架
summary: Transitive 2.0 adds ClickHouse, Grafana, and Alertmanager, offering advanced storage and monitoring to help scale growing robot fleets. The post Transitive Robotics announces Transitive 2.0 open-source robotics framework appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Transitive Robotics announces Transitive 2.0 open-source robotics framework）

title: Pickle Robot 分享将机器人带出实验室并进入现场的经验教训
summary: At the Robotics Summit, Pickle Robot's founder and CTO  will break down the lessons it learned in making warehouse robots commercially viable. The post Pickle Robot to share lessons learned from taking robots out of the lab and into the field appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Pickle Robot to share lessons learned from taking robots out of the lab and into the field）

title: Locus Robotics 推出 Locus Array 以实现完全自主履行
summary: Locus Array is designed to complete fulfillment workflows without manual intervention and is already in use at DHL and other customers. The post Locus Robotics launches Locus Array for fully autonomous fulfillment appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Locus Robotics launches Locus Array for fully autonomous fulfillment）

title: AGIBOT推出Genie Studio Agent机器人零代码应用平台
summary: AGIBOT said it designed Genie Studio Agent to provide a full lifecycle software infrastructure, from development to deployment. The post AGIBOT launches Genie Studio Agent zero-code application platform for robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：AGIBOT launches Genie Studio Agent zero-code application platform for robots）

title: 宾厄姆顿的研究人员创造了可以行走和说话的机器人导盲犬
summary: Scientists at Binghamton University have developed a robotic guide dog that uses large language models to communicate in real time with the visually impaired. The post Binghamton researchers create robotic guide dogs that walk — and talk appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Binghamton researchers create robotic guide dogs that walk — and talk）
